mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.batch_id, c.plain_code, c.status, c.success_use_count, c.create_time, l.create_time AS last_success_time, l.client_ip AS last_success_client_ip, l.user_id AS last_success_user_id FROM coupon_activation_code c LEFT JOIN coupon_activation_log l ON l.activation_code_id = c.id AND l.result_status = 'SUCCESS' AND l.is_deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM coupon_activation_log nl WHERE nl.activation_code_id = c.id AND nl.result_status = 'SUCCESS' AND nl.is_deleted = 0 AND ( nl.create_time > l.create_time OR (nl.create_time = l.create_time AND nl.id > l.id) )) WHERE c.batch_id = #{batchId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time ASC, c.id ASC

SELECT c.id, c.batch_id, c.plain_code, c.status, c.success_use_count, c.create_time, l.create_time AS last_success_time, l.client_ip AS last_success_client_ip, l.user_id AS last_success_user_id FROM coupon_activation_code c LEFT JOIN coupon_activation_log l ON l.activation_code_id = c.id AND l.result_status = 'SUCCESS' AND l.is_deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM coupon_activation_log nl WHERE nl.activation_code_id = c.id AND nl.result_status = 'SUCCESS' AND nl.is_deleted = 0 AND ( nl.create_time > l.create_time OR (nl.create_time = l.create_time AND nl.id > l.id) )) WHERE c.batch_id = #{batchId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time ASC, c.id ASC

SELECT b.id AS batch_id, c.id AS code_id, b.batch_no, b.template_id, b.redeem_rule_type, b.validity_type, b.fixed_effective_time, b.fixed_expire_time, b.relative_valid_days, b.status AS batch_status, c.status AS code_status, c.plain_code FROM coupon_activation_code c INNER JOIN coupon_activation_batch b ON b.id = c.batch_id WHERE c.code_hash = #{codeHash} AND c.is_deleted = 0 AND b.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO coupon_activation_code (batch_id, code_hash, plain_code, status, success_use_count, version, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, is_deleted) VALUES
(#{item.batchId}, #{item.codeHash}, #{item.plainCode}, #{item.status}, #{item.successUseCount}, #{item.version}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.isDeleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon_activation_code SET status = 'USED', success_use_count = success_use_count + 1, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_by = #{operatorId} WHERE id = #{codeId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND success_use_count = 0
UPDATE coupon_activation_code SET success_use_count = success_use_count + 1, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_by = #{operatorId} WHERE id = #{codeId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'ACTIVE'
